i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for ambiental permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style parlamentaria democracia. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B PIB) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Cuando Scope 3 financed emisiones are disclosed per financial institution, W se vuelve computable from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed emisiones disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Cuando banks must disclose the emisiones their lending supports, el interés superpuesto en fossil fuel financing se debilita — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Adoptar TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed emisiones reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: Hacer cumplir enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: Fortalecer climate-related listing requirements
Abogar a través de IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
Presionar por Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income economía ($37.1B PIB) with agriculture at 11.2% PIB (coffee, palm oil, bananas). Manufactura al 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives deforestación in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when deforestación is linked to specific supply chains, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestación traceability for palm oil exports. Cuando buyers must verify origin, el interés superpuesto en forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based deforestación monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Report illegal deforestación to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Palm oil companies (Dinant, Jaremar): Adoptar RSPO certification and zero-deforestación commitments
Implementar community benefit-sharing agreements
International buyers: Require traceability
MiAmbiente+: Fortalecer ambiental impact assessment for agricultural expansion
SAG (Secretariat of Agriculture): Reformar agricultural incentives
ICF: Hacer cumplir protected area boundaries
Contacte a su Diputado in the Congreso Nacional para exigir enforcement of ambiental protections
Support Escazú Agreement ratification for protection of ambiental defenders
Abogar a través de SICA for Central American deforestación governance
Presionar por international accountability for violence against ambiental defenders
i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for ambiental defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential democracia. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B PIB) with dominant services sector (60.8% PIB, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Agricultura al 2.9% PIB. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Implementar EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformarulation mandates reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a HAH (Croatian Food Agency)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
Report misleading claims to AZTN (competition authority)
Croatian food companies: Invertir en minimally processed alternatives
Adoptar Nutri-Score voluntarily

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B PIB) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Agricultura al 15.9% PIB (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme deforestación (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Manufactura al 26.2% PIB (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total deforestación (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The dependencia del sistema is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of deforestación-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Reformar agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Cuando hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, el interés superpuesto en continued deforestación breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme dependencia del sistema — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing dependencia del sistema.
a: Document deforestación through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
Invertir en tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)
Charcoal alternatives: Support LPG transition programs
MDE: Hacer cumplir (to extent possible) remaining forest protections
MARNDR (Agriculture Ministry): Prioritize hillside agroforestry programs
ONEV: Support reforestation monitoring
Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
Abogar a través de CARICOM for regional ambiental support
Presionar por debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on ambiental restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most ambiental programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — ambiental monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: miembro de la UE ($222.7B PIB) with strong manufacturing (15.8% PIB, automotive-focused). Servicios al 59.5% PIB. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Agricultura al 2.7% PIB. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Cuando health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Fortalecer the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax se debilita el interés superpuesto en high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformarulation targets can reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a NÉBIH (National Food Chain Safety Office)
Document food safety violations
Use Hungarian denunciante law (transposition of EU Directive)
Hungarian food companies: Reformarulate to reduce UPF
Invertir en traditional Hungarian food products
Adoptar transparent nutritional labelling
Ministry of Human Capacities: Fortalecer NETA tax and expand coverage
NÉBIH: Hacer cumplir marketing claim standards
NEAK: Publish diet-related healthcare cost data
Contacte a su Képviselő in the Országgyűlés para exigir expansion of the NETA health tax
Support EU-wide front-of-pack labelling through Farm to Fork Strategy
Advocate for WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
Presionar por EU cohesion funds for public health nutrition programs
i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 economía ($1,396.3B PIB). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% PIB). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and minería (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic deforestación.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-deforestación traceability to plantation level. Cuando por plantaation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W se vuelve computable from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-deforestación supply chain traceability. Cuando international buyers require verified deforestación-free palm oil, el interés superpuesto en clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession ambiental data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors deforestación by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Parcialmente rompible. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.
a: Report illegal deforestación to KLHK (Ministry of Environment and Forestry)
Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)
Wilmar, Golden Agri-Resources, Sinar Mas: Implementar full NDPE (No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation) commitments
Adoptar RSPO certification across all operations
Invertir en yield improvement rather than area expansion
KLHK: Hacer cumplir the permanent moratorium on new primary forest and peatland conversion
Fortalecer ISPO mandatory certification with ambiental performance metrics
BPN (National Land Agency): Resolve overlapping land claims through One Map Policy
Contacte a su member of the DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat) para exigir enforcement of the forest moratorium and peatland protection
Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders
Abogar a través de ASEAN for regional zero-deforestación commitments
Presionar por international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, ambiental regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest ambiental NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Aceite de Palma) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential democracia and the world's third-largest democracia.

IE.s: High-income EU economía ($609.2B PIB, inflated by multinational profit booking). Manufactura al 29.6% PIB (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Agricultura al 1% PIB but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emisiones. Servicios al 60.6% PIB.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emisiones by 20%+. Cuando per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W se vuelve computable from agricultural production data.
bp: Reformar CAP subsidies from production-linked to ambiental outcome-linked. Cuando dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, el interés superpuesto en herd growth se debilita.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.
a: Report ambiental violations to EPA Ireland
Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
Invertir en methane-reducing feed technologies
Adoptar Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: Reformar agricultural supports toward emisiones reduction
EPA: Fortalecer agricultural emisiones monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable
Contacte a su TD (Teachta Dála) or Senator para exigir binding agricultural emisiones reduction targets
Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS
Presionar por Ireland's Climate Action Plan sectoral emisiones ceilings to be enforced
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's ambiental regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's denunciante protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Desarrollarment Act (2021) sets legally binding emisiones budgets.

IL.s: High-tech economía ($540.4B PIB) with dominant services (72.5% PIB). High military expenditure (8.78% PIB). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emisiones disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emisiones benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Cuando renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the interés superpuesto se debilita.
Mandatory por campo emisiones disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
No se puede romper by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report ambiental violations to the Ministry of Environmental Protection
Document offshore emisiones — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
Informar a ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading
NewMed Energy (formerly Delek Drilling), Chevron: Set emisiones reduction targets for Leviathan and Tamar
Invertir en regional energía renovable integration
Adoptar TCFD-aligned disclosure
Petroleum Commissioner: Require por campo emisiones monitoring
Electricity Authority: Accelerate energía renovable targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Fortalecer offshore ambiental standards
Contacte a su member of the Knesset para exigir binding energía renovable targets and gas emisiones disclosure
Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include energía renovable cooperation with Gulf states
Presionar por OECD ambiental performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's autoridad ambiental. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has denunciante protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the estatal gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Reformar aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent economía ($279.6B PIB) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Cuando gas capture infrastructure is built, el interés superpuesto en flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking por campo flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report ambiental violations through international operator compliance channels (BP, TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil)
Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): Invertir en associated gas capture infrastructure
Implementar flare reduction targets
SOMO (State Organization for Marketing of Oil): Adoptar emisiones disclosure standards
Ministry of Oil: Hacer cumplir gas flaring reduction targets in Technical Service Contracts
Ministry of Environment: Fortalecer air quality enforcement near oil fields
EITI Iraq: Expand reporting to include flaring and emisiones data
Support World Bank GGFR zero routine flaring by 2030 initiative for Iraq
Abogar a través de OPEC for managed transition and gas monetization investment
Presionar por international climate finance for gas capture infrastructure
Support UN Iraq partnership on ambiental governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for ambiental regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for ambiental policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlamentaria democracia but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B PIB) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international sanciones. Manufactura al 20.6% PIB. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International sanciones have already weakened the interés superpuesto by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Cuando sanciones enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Cuando Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for energía renovable investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The interés superpuesto in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field ambiental data is largely unavailable due to sanciones-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report ambiental violations to DoE (Department of Environment)
Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
Invertir en domestic solar and wind energy development
Implementar emisiones monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: Implementar flaring reduction programs
DoE: Fortalecer air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate energía renovable development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
Abogar a través de OPEC for managed transition planning
Presionar por ambiental conditionality in any future sanciones relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora ambiental advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's autoridad ambiental, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective denunciante protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for energía renovable development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced economía ($33.3B PIB) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Pesca are 5% of PIB and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Cuando ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Cuando quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, el interés superpuesto en maximum extraction se debilita.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of Pesca)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's denunciante protections
Samherji, Íslandsbanki: Adoptar sustainability-linked targets for fishing operations
Implementar per-vessel bycatch reduction technology
Support ecosystem-based fisheries management
Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Pesca: Reformar ITQ system to include ecosystem impact costs
Marine Research Institute: Publish ecosystem health indicators alongside quota recommendations
Fiskistofa: Fortalecer monitoring and enforcement
Contacte a su member of the Alþingi para exigir ecosystem-based fisheries management reform
Support NEAFC (North-East Atlantic Pesca Commission) sustainable management measures
Advocate for Arctic Council fisheries governance coordination
Presionar por inclusion of ecosystem health metrics in national accounts
i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Pesca) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Pesca — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B PIB) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower transparencia than UK mainland. Cuando beneficial ownership data and tax transparencia information are published, W se vuelve computable from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership transparencia aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Cuando financial secrecy is eliminated, the interés superpuesto between service providers and opacity-seeking clients se debilita.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Implementar enhanced beneficial ownership due diligence
Adoptar ESG integration across fund and trust structures
Align with UK transparencia standards ahead of regulatory mandates
JFSC/GFSC: Fortalecer beneficial ownership verification
Implementar UK Economic Crime Act-aligned transparencia
Hacer cumplir enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
Presionar por alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey Servicios Financieros Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Servicios Financieros Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island economía ($22B PIB) with tourism and services dominant (60% PIB). Agricultura al 8% PIB. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Cuando soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Cuando farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the interés superpuesto breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects ambiental data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's autoridad ambiental. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Pesca — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlamentaria democracia.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern economía ($53.4B PIB) with limited natural resources. Servicios al 60.4% PIB. High military expenditure (4.8% PIB). Manufactura al 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash minería (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Cuando ambiental cost data is published alongside minería revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Internalize ambiental costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into minería operations through ambiental levies. Cuando miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, el interés superpuesto en water-intensive extraction se debilita.
Publish por mina water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to minería output makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

Presionar por OECD water governance recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's autoridad ambiental. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees minería policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the minería regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a monarquía constitucional with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest economía ($120.3B PIB) with agriculture at 22.5% PIB (tea, coffee, horticulture). Servicios al 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Cuando per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W se vuelve computable. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Reformar agricultural export incentives to require ambiental certification. Cuando tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, el interés superpuesto en intensive monoculture se debilita.
Farm-level ambiental data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce dependencia del sistema.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's ambiental regulator, responsible for ambiental impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Pesca and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong ambiental protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous economía ($17.5B PIB) dominated by gold minería (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of PIB, min=11.15%). Agricultura al 8.6% PIB. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary democracia (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Cuando ambiental monitoring data is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all minería. Cuando remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

i: SAEPF — ambiental agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state minería interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — minería regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income economía ($46.4B PIB) with garment manufacturing (27.8% PIB) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta deforestación ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes deforestación computable.
bp: Reformar economic land concession system to require ambiental compliance. Cuando concession holders face revocation for deforestación, the interés superpuesto se debilita.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.

i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts sociedad civil. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has ambiental certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Pesca — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B PIB) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the interés superpuesto se debilita. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Cuando the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, el interés superpuesto en oil dependence breaks.
Per-field emisiones disclosure for KPC operations. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the ambiental regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.

Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a monarquía constitucional with genuine (if limited) parlamentaria debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest economía ($291.5B PIB) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and ambiental incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S emisiones and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Cuando non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, el interés superpuesto en continued extraction breaks.
Per-field emisiones and ambiental monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making ambiental and health costs visible makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — autoridad ambiental. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian ambiental cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian economía ($16.5B PIB) with agriculture at 16.8% PIB and minería at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's minería sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Cuando ambiental monitoring data is published alongside minería revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for minería licenses. Cuando remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine ambiental data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a estado de partido único (LPRP). No independent sociedad civil or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees minería and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Desarrollarment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed economía ($20.1B PIB, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the interés superpuesto has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Cuando accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the interés superpuesto between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible — the crisis has already revealed dependencia del sistema. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island economía ($99B PIB) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Agricultura al 8.3% PIB (tea, rubber, coconut). Manufactura al 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural dependencia del sistema works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Cuando transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, el interés superpuesto en chemical-dependent monoculture se debilita sustainably.
Per-estate ambiental data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Parcialmente rompible. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of dependencia del sistema (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

i: CEA (Central Environmental Authority) — Sri Lanka's ambiental regulator. Registrar of Pesticides — under the Department of Agriculture, regulates pesticide use. Tea Research Institute — conducts research on sustainable tea production.
Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and ambiental governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B PIB). Servicios al 63.6% PIB. Manufactura al 14% PIB. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Agricultura al 2.6% PIB.

sectors.w: Lithuania's health insurance system (VLK) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack health labelling implementation.
VLK publication of diet-related healthcare data.
Not fully breakable. Reformarulation can reduce dependencia del sistema.

Major companies: Vilniaus Pienine, Rokiškio Sūris (dairy).
VLK (Valstybinė ligonių kasa / National Health Insurance Fund) — manages health insurance data.
Seimas (Parliament of Lithuania) — unicameral, 141 members. Contact through lrs.lt.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B PIB, highest PIB per capita globally). Servicios al 81.2% PIB. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Cuando financed emisiones and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W se vuelve computable from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Cuando fund-level financed emisiones and beneficial ownership are transparent, el interés superpuesto en opaque financial intermediation se debilita.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.

i: CSSF — Luxembourg's financial regulator, supervising banks, investment funds, and other financial entities. CRF (Cellule de Renseignement Financier) — financial intelligence unit.
Luxembourg hosts 3,600+ investment funds. ALFI (Association of the Luxembourg Fund Industry) — the industry association.
CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B PIB). Servicios al 64.6% PIB. Forestry significant. Agricultura al 4% PIB. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

sectors.w: Latvia's NVD health insurance tracks costs. Publishing diet-related data makes W computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack labelling.
NVD diet-related healthcare cost publication.
Reformarulation mandates reduce dependencia del sistema.

i: PVD (Pārtikas un veterinārais dienests) — food and veterinary authority. Latvia transposed EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Major companies: Rīgas Piena kombināts, Latvijas Balzams.
NVD (Nacionālais veselības dienests / National Health Service) — manages health insurance.
Saeima — unicameral parliament, 100 members. Contact through saeima.lv.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B PIB) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The interés superpuesto is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Cuando oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), el interés superpuesto en capturing oil infrastructure se debilita.
NOC por campo production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to ambiental data makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors sanciones compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African economía ($160.6B PIB) with agriculture at 10.6% PIB and growing energía renovable sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Manufactura al 15.3% PIB.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate minería generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Cuando por mina ambiental data is published alongside production revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Cuando OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, el interés superpuesto en low-cost extraction se debilita.

Mandatory por mina ambiental disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable por mina data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce dependencia del sistema.

Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees minería and ambiental policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a monarquía constitucional with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B PIB) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest PIB per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Cuando beneficial ownership and tax transparencia data are published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum transparencia standards and CRS information exchange. Cuando opacity is eliminated, the interés superpuesto se debilita.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.

Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a monarquía constitucional (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European economía ($18.2B PIB). Agricultura al 7.1% PIB (wine, agriculture). Servicios al 62.3%. candidato a la UE country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Cuando soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style ambiental conditionality. Cuando subsidies reward soil health, el interés superpuesto en exhaustive monoculture se debilita.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce dependencia del sistema.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot economía ($17.4B PIB). Agricultura al 22.5% PIB. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating deforestación (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Cuando deforestación data is linked to agricultural output, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Cuando tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, el interés superpuesto en forest clearing breaks.
Satellite deforestación monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Hace W computable.
Extreme dependencia del sistema. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

i: MNP (Madagascar National Parks) — manages protected areas. WWF, Conservation International, WCS — major international conservation organizations with Madagascar programs.
QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite minería. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the ambiental assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan economía ($17B PIB). Manufactura al 14.3% PIB. Servicios al 56.2%. candidato a la UE country. Coal-dependent energy. Agricultura al 6.1% PIB.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant emisiones and health cost disclosure. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Coal combustion releases pollutants.

ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — regulador energético. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. candidato a la UE country.

ML.s: Sahelian economía ($26.8B PIB) with gold minería (16.18% PIB) and agriculture (33.3% PIB). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold minería generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Cuando ambiental data is published alongside production, W se vuelve computable.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level ambiental compliance. Cuando buyers verify conditions, el interés superpuesto en unregulated extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal minería dependencia del sistema.

i: DNGM — national geological and minería directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees minería policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes ambiental obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich economía ($74.1B PIB) under military junta since 2021 coup. Rentas de gas 4.4%. Jade and gem minería (est. $31B/year — more than formal PIB). Agricultura al 20.8% PIB. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Cuando jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W se vuelve computable.
bp: International sanciones targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Cuando revenue is blocked, the interés superpuesto between the military and jade minería se debilita.
Supply chain transparencia for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted sanciones by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked economía ($23.8B PIB). Mining at 26.57% PIB (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% PIB. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary democracia — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's minería sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Cuando por mina ambiental data is linked to production revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Cuando minería companies pay for water in arid steppe, el interés superpuesto en water-intensive extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlamentaria democracia with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism economía ($49.5B PIB). Servicios al 83.8% PIB. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Cuando social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Cuando social costs are visible alongside revenues, el interés superpuesto en revenue maximization without harm mitigation se debilita.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce dependencia del sistema.

Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island economía ($25B PIB). Servicios al 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). miembro de la UE. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU parlamentaria democracia.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island economía ($14.9B PIB). Servicios al 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Manufactura al 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Cuando financial opacity is eliminated, the interés superpuesto se debilita.

National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlamentaria democracia with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income economía ($11.3B PIB). Agricultura al 31.8% PIB — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the interés superpuesto between tobacco growers and buyers se debilita.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Cuando alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, el interés superpuesto en tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of degradación del suelo and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Hace W computable.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce dependencia del sistema.

National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential democracia. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income economía ($422.2B PIB). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Manufactura al 22.5% PIB (electronics, automotive). Servicios al 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Cuando por plantaation ambiental data is linked to trade, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestación traceability. Cuando buyers verify origin, el interés superpuesto en forest conversion for plantations breaks.

Parcialmente rompible. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Aceite de Palma) — the national mandatory certification scheme.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal monarquía constitucional and parlamentaria democracia.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing economía ($22.7B PIB). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Agricultura al 25.2% PIB. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Cuando per-project ambiental and social cost data is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and ambiental standards. Cuando development is linked to social outcomes, el interés superpuesto en extraction without accountability se debilita.
Per-project ambiental disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income economía ($13.4B PIB) with minería at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Agricultura al 7.3% PIB. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium minería (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Cuando por mina ambiental monitoring is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium minería. Cuando miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, el interés superpuesto en water-intensive extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring disclosure. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Uranium minería generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate dependencia del sistema.

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong sociedad civil for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese estatal). Namibia also has significant diamond minería (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees minería policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential democracia with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian economía ($19.9B PIB). Agricultura al 34.5% PIB. Uranium minería (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium minería (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Cuando remediation costs are pre-funded, interés superpuesto in extraction without accountability se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Uranium minería generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate dependencia del sistema.

Support EITI enhanced reporting
i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — ambiental assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees minería policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American economía ($19.7B PIB). Agricultura al 14.4% PIB. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Servicios al 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold minería generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Cuando ambiental data is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.
a: Report through international minería company channels (Calibre Mining, B2Gold)
Document ambiental impacts through diaspora channels
Calibre Mining, B2Gold: Apply international ambiental standards

MARENA: Monitoring

i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — autoridad ambiental. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly autoritario. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — minería regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian economía ($42.9B PIB). Agricultura al 21.9% PIB. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of PIB. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Cuando per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Cuando hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, el interés superpuesto en unsustainable cultivation se debilita.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce dependencia del sistema.

Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)

i: DoE — autoridad ambiental under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Desarrollarment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced economía ($260.2B PIB) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Agricultura al 4.4% PIB but outsized ambiental footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Servicios al 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Cuando per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Implementar the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Cuando farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, el interés superpuesto en herd expansion se debilita.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Informar a regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Adoptar binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Implementar methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Hacer cumplir NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Reformar farm support toward ambiental outcomes
EPA: Fortalecer agricultural chemical regulation

Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural emisiones (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) ambiental provisions
Presionar por inclusion of biological methane in national emisiones reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary ambiental regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national ambiental policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong denunciante protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve ambiental bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf economía ($107.1B PIB) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Desarrollarment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Cuando hydrogen revenue streams are established, el interés superpuesto en oil dependence se debilita.
Per-field emisiones disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
