i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's ambiental regulator. PDO (Petroleum Desarrollarment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlamentaria activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant economía ($86.5B PIB) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Servicios al 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá minería contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The interés superpuesto between the minería company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of minería contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the interés superpuesto through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing dependencia del sistema.

Ensure worker transition support

i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — autoridad ambiental. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the minería contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees minería concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich economía ($289.2B PIB) with minería at 12.1% PIB (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Agricultura al 7.3%. Servicios al 51.3%. Social conflicts around minería are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's minería sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Cuando ambiental monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Cuando indigenous communities can effectively negotiate ambiental conditions, el interés superpuesto en extraction without consent se debilita.
Mandatory por mina ambiental monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's minería ambiental standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.

i: OEFA — Peru's ambiental enforcement agency for the minería sector, conducting inspections and imposing sanciones. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts ambiental impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and minería ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island economía ($31.8B PIB). Mining at 14.41% PIB, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Agricultura al 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's minería sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic ambiental damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory ambiental bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Cuando remediation is pre-funded, interés superpuesto in low-cost disposal se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce dependencia del sistema.

i: CEPA — PNG's autoridad ambiental. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — minería regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the minería regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a monarquía constitucional (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlamentaria democracia.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian economía ($461.6B PIB). Servicios al 63.2% PIB. Agricultura al 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Manufactura al 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel minería (for EV batteries) generates significant ambiental damage on small islands. Cuando por mina ambiental data is linked to nickel exports, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for minería permits. President Duterte's 2017 minería audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks el interés superpuesto en non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.

i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages minería regulation. Philippines has relatively active sociedad civil and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs minería operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential democracia.

PK.s: Large economía ($371.6B PIB) with agriculture at 23.7% PIB (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Manufactura al 13.2%. Servicios al 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Cuando per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Cuando farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, el interés superpuesto en water-intensive monoculture se debilita.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce dependencia del sistema.

i: Pakistan EPA — federal autoridad ambiental. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own ambiental agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlamentaria democracia.

PL.s: Major EU economía ($917.8B PIB) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Manufactura al 16.1% PIB. Servicios al 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Cuando full carbon costs are internalized, the interés superpuesto between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The interés superpuesto breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emisiones and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.

Use Polish denunciante law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)

Invertir en offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)

i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief ambiental inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal minería company (estatal, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the regulador energético. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the ambiental fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with minería unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B PIB) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of PIB — among world's highest pharma concentration). Servicios al 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Cuando diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Cuando imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, el interés superpuesto en high-margin processed imports se debilita.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Hace W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.

i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal denunciante protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B PIB, severely constrained by occupation). Agricultura al 7.4% PIB. Servicios al 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Cuando water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Cuando Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, el interés superpuesto en restricting agricultural development se debilita.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme dependencia del sistema. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.

Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian autoridad ambiental. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU economía ($313.3B PIB). Servicios al 66.3% PIB. Agricultura al 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Manufactura al 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Implementar EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Hace W computable.
Not fully breakable. Reformarulation mandates reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese denunciante law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Reformarulate products
Adoptar front-of-pack labelling

ASAE: Hacer cumplir marketing standards

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's denunciante protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlamentaria democracia.

PY.s: Landlocked South American economía ($44.5B PIB). Agricultura al 10.7% PIB (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Manufactura al 19% PIB. Servicios al 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe deforestación from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco deforestación. Cuando per-farm deforestación and degradación del suelo data is linked to soy exports, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestación soy. Cuando EU buyers require verified deforestación-free origin, el interés superpuesto en Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based deforestación monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce degradación del suelo.
a: Report illegal deforestación to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Implementar zero-deforestación soy sourcing for Paraguay
Adoptar Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Invertir en yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Hacer cumplir the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate ambiental standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Fortalecer forest monitoring and enforcement
Contacte a su Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional para exigir extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur ambiental provisions enforcement
Presionar por indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where deforestación continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated economía ($219.2B PIB). Industria al 58.2% PIB. Rentas petroleras 15.28% PIB, gas rents 12.01% PIB — world's largest LNG exporter. Servicios al 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emisiones globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Cuando importers reduce LNG dependence, the interés superpuesto se debilita.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, el interés superpuesto en fossil gas dependence se debilita.
Per-field emisiones and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
No se puede romper. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emisiones.
a: Informar a QatarEnergy HSE division
Documentar a través de international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Informar a Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Invertir en blue and green hydrogen

Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate emisiones reduction targets
Abogar a través de GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional emisiones standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Presionar por LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on emisiones intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — estatal, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — ambiental regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: miembro de la UE economía ($382.6B PIB). Manufactura al 13.2% PIB. Rentas de gas 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Servicios al 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite miembro de la UEship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Cuando soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Cuando subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, el interés superpuesto en exhaustive monoculture se debilita.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
Informar a Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Documentar a través de Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: Implementar EU eco-schemes

Abogar a través de European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian ambiental NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — ambiental protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). miembro de la UE since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan economía ($90.1B PIB). Manufactura al 12.7%. Rentas de carbón 0.24% PIB — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. candidato a la UE country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emisiones and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Informar a Ministry of Environmental Protection
Documentar a través de CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Desarrollarment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Desarrollar lignite phase-out roadmap

Presionar por EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — autoridad ambiental. CEKOR — Serbian ambiental NGO. RES Foundation — energía renovable advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara minería basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — regulador energético. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. candidato a la UE country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon economía ($2,173.8B PIB). Rentas petroleras 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, minería 2.05% PIB. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Gasto militar 7.05% PIB. Authoritarian governance under international sanciones since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western sanciones and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the interés superpuesto.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Cuando importers eliminate dependence, el interés superpuesto en Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced transparencia — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
No se puede romper. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to sanciones enforcement authorities
Documentar a través de investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Hacer cumplir sanciones compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Fortalecer enforcement against evasion
EU: Close sanciones loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international sanciones on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening

Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic sociedad civil is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian ambiental issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU sanciones packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — sanciones enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international sanciones coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African economía ($14.3B PIB). Agricultura al 24.6% PIB. Rentas forestales 3.97%. Servicios al 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but autoritario governance. Strong ambiental policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and degradación del suelo. Cuando soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the interés superpuesto.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Documentar a través de RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Desarrollarment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Adoptar terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Desarrollarment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards

REMA: Hacer cumplir hillside protection zones

Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union ambiental governance frameworks
i: REMA — the ambiental management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes ambiental sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected economía ($49.7B PIB). Agricultura al 22.2% PIB. Mining 6.63% (gold). Rentas petroleras 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold minería uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Cuando gold revenue flows are traced, W se vuelve computable.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Cuando refiners verify provenance, the interés superpuesto between armed groups and gold revenues se debilita.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Artisanal minería uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Documentar a través de INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Implementar enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International sanciones bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council sanciones on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Presionar por UAE cooperation on gold trade transparencia
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal minería
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors sanciones and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal minería and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Desarrollarment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic economía ($603.7B PIB). Manufactura al 13% PIB. Mining 1% PIB (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Servicios al 66.4%. Strong ambiental regulations. miembro de la UE. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore minería (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Cuando por mina ambiental and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and ambiental remediation. Cuando LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, el interés superpuesto en low-cost extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Parcialmente rompible. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that minería's downstream dependencia del sistema on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Informar a Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Informar a Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Documentar a través de Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Implementar enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Fortalecer ambiental conditions in minería permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous ambiental review

Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Presionar por EU taxonomy alignment of minería ambiental standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — ambiental protection agency. Bergsstaten — the minería inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.
LKAB — estatal iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals minería and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized ambiental courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs minería permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a monarquía constitucional and miembro de la UE.

SG.s: Advanced city-state economía ($547.4B PIB). Servicios al 73% PIB. Manufactura al 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Cuando refinery emisiones and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's impuesto al carbono rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Cuando refining margins incorporate carbon costs, el interés superpuesto en unpriced emisiones se debilita.
Per-refinery emisiones and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce dependencia del sistema over time.
a: Informar a NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS denunciante channels for financial misconduct
Documentar a través de SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Implementar carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Invertir en green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate impuesto al carbono escalation timeline
MAS: Fortalecer climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate energía renovable targets
Engage through available parlamentaria channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN ambiental cooperation frameworks
Abogar a través de Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Presionar por IMO shipping emisiones standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — ambiental regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — regulador energético. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlamentaria republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small miembro de la UE economía ($73B PIB). Manufactura al 19.4% PIB. Servicios al 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). miembro de la UE since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong ambiental awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Cuando soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Cuando subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, el interés superpuesto en exhaustive monoculture se debilita.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Desarrollarment). Hace W computable.

Parcialmente rompible. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Informar a ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)

Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Abogar a través de Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Desarrollarment. Focus — ambiental NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. miembro de la UE since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European miembro de la UE ($140.9B PIB). Manufactura al 16.3% PIB — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Servicios al 60%. miembro de la UE since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Cuando per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Cuando consumers can identify ultra-processing, el interés superpuesto en opaque ingredient lists se debilita.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
No se puede romper. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Informar a ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)

Abogar a través de WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Desarrollarment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. miembro de la UE since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African economía ($32.8B PIB). Agricultura al 16.6% PIB. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Pesca crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe sobrepesca by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Cuando per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Reformar fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Cuando EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, el interés superpuesto en sobrepesca se debilita.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Documentar a través de ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Adoptar sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Pesca: Reformar fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Pesca Commission): Coordinate regional management
Contacte a su Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) para exigir reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Abogar a través de AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Presionar por RFMO (Regional Pesca Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Pesca and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B PIB). Limited economic data available. Rentas forestales 11.24% PIB (charcoal — major deforestación driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Cuando charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to deforestación data, W se vuelve computable.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Cuando the ban is effectively enforced, the interés superpuesto between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade se debilita.
Satellite deforestación monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Informar a UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Documentar a través de Somali ambiental organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Hacer cumplir import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Invertir en LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Hacer cumplir charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Fortalecer monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Presionar por alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute ambiental programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors sanciones including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN sanciones framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American economía ($35.4B PIB). Servicios al 61% PIB. Agricultura al 4.4%. Manufactura al 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of PIB). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Cuando CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Cuando sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, el interés superpuesto en unregulated pesticide/herbicide use se debilita.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Informar a MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Implementar worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Adoptar mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Invertir en worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Abogar a través de PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Presionar por ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — ambiental regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated economía ($23.6B PIB). Agricultura al 43.1% PIB — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Rentas petroleras 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Cuando oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Cuando reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, el interés superpuesto en opaque extraction se debilita.
Oil revenue flow transparencia as condition of reconstruction assistance and sanciones relief. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in ambiental standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document ambiental damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Adoptar ambiental standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on ambiental and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Abogar a través de UN-led political process for resource revenue transparencia
Presionar por ambiental damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian economía ($19.5B PIB). Rentas petroleras 16.75% PIB. Agricultura al 37.7%. Rentas forestales 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue transparencia mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Cuando oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Restore oil revenue transparencia mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks el interés superpuesto en opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Documentar a través de international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Informar a international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Implementar ambiental and transparencia standards
Savannah Energy: Adoptar EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue transparencia
Ministry of Petroleum: Hacer cumplir ambiental regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue transparencia
Abogar a través de African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Presionar por World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission ambiental programs
i: Note: Chad's sociedad civil space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue transparencia coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African economía ($10.7B PIB). Agricultura al 21.3% PIB. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Servicios al 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate minería (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Cuando por mina ambiental data is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Cuando export markets require cadmium limits, el interés superpuesto en unprocessed phosphate extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Informar a ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Documentar a través de community organizations in phosphate minería regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Invertir en cadmium removal technology
Implementar mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Adoptar international ambiental reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Fortalecer ambiental conditions in minería permits
ANGE: Hacer cumplir ambiental impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to ambiental data disclosure
Engage through available parlamentaria channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS ambiental governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Presionar por EITI full membership with ambiental disclosure
i: ANGE — national ambiental management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — minería oversight. ANGE — ambiental assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlamentaria system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian economía ($526.5B PIB). Manufactura al 24.3% PIB (automotive, electronics, food processing). Agricultura al 8.7%. Servicios al 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Cuando per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators se debilita el interés superpuesto en opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Informar a Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Documentar a través de Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Reformarulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Adoptar transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Fortalecer sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Contacte a su สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) para exigir UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Abogar a través de WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Presionar por Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a monarquía constitucional. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian economía ($14.2B PIB). Mining 7.09% PIB (gold, silver, antimony). Agricultura al 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of PIB from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's minería sector includes artisanal gold minería with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Cuando per-facility emisiones and ambiental data are published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Cuando aluminum and gold buyers require ambiental compliance verification, el interés superpuesto en unregulated production se debilita.
Per-facility ambiental monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emisiones and gold minería mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. TALCO smelter emisiones can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Documentar a través de Central Asian ambiental networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Invertir en emisiones reduction technology
Gold minería companies: Adoptar mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require ambiental compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Fortalecer ambiental enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO emisiones modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to ambiental data
Support international pressure for ambiental standards in Tajik minería through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Abogar a través de OSCE ambiental dimension for monitoring support
Presionar por Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal minería
Support EITI candidacy advancement with ambiental disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for ambiental reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik minería.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold minería includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — ambiental regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively estado de partido único (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed economía ($51.4B PIB). Manufactura al 18% PIB. One of the world's most autoritario states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Cuando methane data is published, W se vuelve computable despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Cuando buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, el interés superpuesto en unmonitored gas production se debilita.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Hace W computable without government cooperation.
No se puede romper. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic sociedad civil exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Documentar a través de Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle emisiones
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Abogar a través de UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Presionar por methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent sociedad civil, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting ambiental issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an autoritario state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African economía ($51.3B PIB). Agricultura al 9.7% PIB. Rentas petroleras 1.55%. Manufactura al 14.8%. Servicios al 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack transparencia. Cuando por campo ambiental and revenue data is published, W se vuelve computable.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue transparencia. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to PIB but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks el interés superpuesto en opaque revenue management.
Per-field ambiental monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Informar a ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Documentar a través de Tunisian ambiental organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Adoptar revenue transparencia standards
Invertir en solar energy transition

Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Implementar hydrocarbon revenue transparencia
ANPE: Fortalecer ambiental monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate energía renovable targets
Engage through available parlamentaria channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Abogar a través de Union for the Mediterranean for energía renovable investment
Presionar por EITI membership as governance transparencia measure
i: ANPE — ambiental protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on ambiental justice. Tunisia has relatively active sociedad civil despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and energía renovable agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income economía ($1,359.1B PIB). Manufactura al 16.8% PIB. Servicios al 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Agricultura al 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Cuando coal plant health costs are internalized, el interés superpuesto en cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Cuando coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emisiones and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Informar a ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Documentar a través de TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)

Abogar a través de G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Presionar por EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework ambiental standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish ambiental NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy economía ($25.6B PIB). Rentas de gas 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% PIB. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Manufactura al 14.4%. Servicios al 59.2%. Parliamentary democracia.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, el interés superpuesto en fossil fuel dependence se debilita naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Cuando production costs rise on mature fields, el interés superpuesto en fossil fuel dependence se debilita as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emisiones and ambiental monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Hace W computable.
No se puede romper. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Informar a EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Informar a MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Documentar a través de Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (ambiental NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Desarrollar gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Implementar carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process emisiones
EMA: Fortalecer air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Desarrollar energía renovable framework

Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Abogar a través de Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Presionar por IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active ambiental NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary democracia with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African economía ($78.8B PIB). Agricultura al 23.3% PIB. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Rentas forestales 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Servicios al 29.6%. Growing economía with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold minería (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Cuando por mina ambiental data is published alongside revenue, W se vuelve computable.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and transparencia requirements. Cuando enforced alongside ambiental monitoring, el interés superpuesto en opaque extraction se debilita.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Hace W computable.
Parcialmente rompible. Mercury-free artisanal minería and improved tailings management reduce dependencia del sistema.
a: Informar a NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Informar a Mining Commission
Documentar a través de LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)

AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Adoptar enhanced tailings management
